subject: Run in Python 3.8
commit_message:
Run in Python 3.8

Use image recommended by SECCOM

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2292

Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I52a358f22c5f9c2e1cad4b574105c8bda10acf25

Patch Set 1:

Vijay, it looks that Jenkins builder has not installed Python 3.8, who can fix that?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Vijay, it looks that Jenkins builder has not installed Python 3.8, who can fix that?

@Jessica - Can you confirm if any of build nodes has python 3.8 installed. The ConfigbindingService JJB is using ubuntu1804-docker-8c-8g node (https://git.onap.org/ci-management/tree/jjb/dcaegen2/dcaegen2-platform-configbinding.yaml); pls advise if any change needed on job.

https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/packer/provision/local-docker.yaml#L100

Feel free to either add 3.8 here in this file and I can help you merge it + update the nodes.

@Vijay, 

I was able to update the builder nodes now. However I am having issues with the docker one.
For some reason that I am still investigating, the image gets lost after being created.. debugging more.. 
thanks for your patience!
